description: Vendor-level metadata. Integration vector and total cost of ownership over 3 years. Captured once per vendor at onboarding, refreshed quarterly.
sub_criteria: Integration vector (MCP server, REST API, plugin marketplace presence, enterprise SSO)
License model (per-seat, per-draft, flat enterprise, hybrid)
Infrastructure cost (self-hosted GPU, cloud inference, vendor-managed)
Maintenance cost (upgrades, new-model rollouts, regression testing)
Switching cost (data export format, eval-set portability, IP ownership of outputs)

scoring_levels.label: Excellent
scoring_levels.criteria: MCP-ready or full REST + SSO; per-seat or flat-enterprise pricing; vendor-managed infrastructure; low switching cost (clean export, IP ownership clear).

scoring_levels.label: Good
scoring_levels.criteria: Strong integration story; pricing predictable; switching cost moderate.

scoring_levels.label: Adequate
scoring_levels.criteria: Basic API or plugin integration; pricing requires forecasting; some switching friction.

scoring_levels.label: Weak
scoring_levels.criteria: Limited integration options; per-draft pricing unpredictable at scale; high switching cost.

scoring_levels.label: Unacceptable
scoring_levels.criteria: UI-only with no API; pricing not transparent; switching effectively impossible (proprietary export, ambiguous IP terms).

track_b_protocol: Captured via vendor onboarding form + 3-year TCO model. Verified against pricing pages, integration docs, and customer-reported actuals where available. Refreshed quarterly.
